title: Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: വേതാളൻ കാവ് മഹാദേവ ക്ഷേത്രം) is located at budhanoor near chengannur alappuzha District, Kerala.
overview.description: Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: വേതാളൻ കാവ് മഹാദേവ ക്ഷേത്രം) is located at budhanoor near chengannur alappuzha District, Kerala. It is one of the rarest temples in the world where Lord Siva is worshiped as Vethala. It is about 31 km east of the famous Oachira Parabrahma temple.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vallikunnam
topPlaces.description: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Oachira Temple
topPlaces.description: Oachira Temple is an ancient temple located in Oachira in Kollam district in the South Indian state of Kerala. According to the Puranas, this temple is one of the famous sacred places of Kerala and India.

topPlaces.name: Krishnapuram Palace
topPlaces.description: The Krishnapuram Palace is a palace and museum located in Kayamkulam near Alappuzha in Alappuzha district, Kerala in southwestern India. It was built in the 18th century by Anizham Thirunal Marthanda Varma (1729–1758 CE), the Travancore kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Changankulangara Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Mahadeva Temple is a Shiva temple at Changankulangara in Kollam in the state of Kerala in India. It is one of the 108 Shiva temples in India.

topPlaces.name: Kappil, Alappuzha
topPlaces.description: Kappil is a small village in Alappuzha district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Changankulangara
topPlaces.description: Changankulangara is a small village in Oachira Panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Its Changankulangara Sree Mahadevar Temple is one of the ancient temples in South India and one of the 108 Shiva Temples installed by the Lord Parasurama.

topPlaces.name: Oachira
topPlaces.description: Oachira or Ochira (Ōcciṟa) is in the Karunagappalli taluk of Kollam district. Oachira Grama Panchayat came into existence in 1953.

topPlaces.name: Valiyakulangara
topPlaces.description: Valiyakulangara is a small town in Alappuzha district in Kerala, India situated south of Oachira. This village was part of Puthuppally Muri up to 1890 AD. After the 'Kandezhuth' this place was included in the Karunagappally taluk.

items.note: Vallikunnam is a village in Mavelikara taluk of Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

Oachira Temple is an ancient temple located in Oachira in Kollam district in the South Indian state of Kerala. According to the Puranas, this temple is one of the famous sacred places of Kerala and India.

The Krishnapuram Palace is a palace and museum located in Kayamkulam near Alappuzha in Alappuzha district, Kerala in southwestern India. It was built in the 18th century by Anizham Thirunal Marthanda Varma (1729–1758 CE), the Travancore kingdom.
Mahadeva Temple is a Shiva temple at Changankulangara in Kollam in the state of Kerala in India. It is one of the 108 Shiva temples in India.
Kappil is a small village in Alappuzha district of Kerala state, India.

Changankulangara is a small village in Oachira Panchayath in Kollam district of Kerala, India. Its Changankulangara Sree Mahadevar Temple is one of the ancient temples in South India and one of the 108 Shiva Temples installed by the Lord Parasurama.
Oachira or Ochira (Ōcciṟa) is in the Karunagappalli taluk of Kollam district. Oachira Grama Panchayat came into existence in 1953.

Valiyakulangara is a small town in Alappuzha district in Kerala, India situated south of Oachira. This village was part of Puthuppally Muri up to 1890 AD. After the 'Kandezhuth' this place was included in the Karunagappally taluk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (85 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vethalan Kavu Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallikunnam, Oachira Temple, Krishnapuram Palace, Changankulangara Mahadeva Temple, Kappil, Alappuzha.
